famous quote:
"The mold in which a key is made would be a strange thing, if you had never seen a key: and the key itself a strange thing if you had never seen a lock. Your soul has a curious shape because it is a hollow made to fit a particular swelling in the infinite contours of the divine substance, or a key to unlock one of the doors in the house with many mansions.

Your place in heaven will seem to be made for you and you alone, because you were made for it -- made for it stitch by stitch as a glove is made for a hand."
-- C.S. Lewis (The Problem of Pain)
Interview Text:
Will:

(part 7)

Will continued physically moving more things from his house. They were things like games, and books that much of the time seemed pretty innocuous. Sometimes they were just generally negative or questionable spiritual things. For example there was an expansion pack for a video game in which the gamer can choose to worship Native American Gods. He realized he just didn't want to worry about that being in his house. He also threw out books that depressed him. He loved the original mummy movies- but one of the themes in it was that the good guys have to play by the other side's rules, which wasn't something he wanted to get in the habit of.

Will said that it's not about acheiving a number of holy points. This is just an eliminating of distractions and that opens up a clearer pathway to hear from God.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine if God's love for us, and ours for him was like this.
